name: toolkit-hardening
description: Six toolkit improvements: compaction guardian, ambiguity gate, cognitive trap tables, failure counter escalation, wonder/reflect phase, knowledge maturation cycle

regressions.reason: Guardian livelock: matcher:* blocks checkpoint dispatch (F2/M1). Also: failure counter catchall too broad (F3), promote-finding self-referential (F5), recent-checkpoint detection undefined (M3), plus 7 medium/low findings.

describe.confidence_note: Clear requirements from user research session, specific overlaps identified

specify.confidence_note: Revision 2: All 15 debate findings addressed. Revision 3 micro-patches: subagent PPID pass-through, stdin read pattern, 4 low-priority clarifications.

challenge.confidence_note: Two debate rounds. Round 1: 2 critical, regressed. Round 2: 0 critical, 2 medium (both fixed), 5 low (4 fixed, 1 accepted). PASS_WITH_NOTES.

edge_cases.confidence_note: PASS_WITH_NOTES: 0 critical, 2 medium (both fixed in spec), 5 low (4 fixed, 1 accepted). All boundary categories covered. Known limitations documented.

premortem.confidence_note: 4 NEW findings (2 medium, 2 low), 2 COVERED. No critical. PM1 (heartbeat), PM2 (disable docs), PM3 (cleanup gap) patched into spec. PM5 (metrics) deferred as future enhancement.

review.skip_reason: Thorough coverage from 2 debate rounds + boundary analysis + pre-mortem. User confirmed sufficient.

test.confidence_note: 54 spec-blind tests across 6 components + 4 contract tests + 4 failure mode tests. All derived from acceptance criteria. Anti-tautology review passed.

execute.confidence_note: All 6 components implemented. 3 parallel agents + integration pass. Structural tests pass. Behavioral tests pass (guardian block/allow, failure escalation ladder, false positive prevention). Enforcement lint clean.
